creator: empty.japan
caption:
Most of us know about onsens - those amazing hot springs in Japan where you soak in mineral-rich waters. But onsen culture offers so much more, from entire towns dedicated to hot springs to delicious meals cooked right in the geothermal waters. 

Recently, I discovered onsen water stations! Just search 温泉スタンド (Onsen sutando) to find one - they are all over Japan! ♨️

transcription.text: May the Force be with you, and God bless you!
